Chapter_Name: – ABETMENT
Offence: Abetment of any offence, if the act abetted is committed in consequence, and where no express provision is made for its punishment.
Arrest: May arrest without warrant if arrest for the offence abetted may be made without warrant, but not otherwise.
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence abetted.
Compoundable: According as the offence abetted is compoundable or not.
Punishment: The same punishment as for the offence abetted.
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence abetted is triable.

Chapter_Name: – ABETMENT
Offence: Abetment of any offence, if the person abetted does the act with a different intention from that of the abettor.
Arrest: May arrest without warrant if arrest for the offence abetted may be made without warrant but not otherwise.
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence abetted.
Compoundable: According as the offence abetted is compoundable or not.
Punishment: The same punishment as for the offence abetted.
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence abetted is triable.

Chapter_Name: – ABETMENT
Offence: Abetment of any offence, when one is abetted and a different act is done; is subject to the proviso
Arrest: May arrest without warrant if arrest for the offence abetted may be made without warrant but not otherwise
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence abetted
Compoundable: According as the offence abetted is compoundable or not
Punishment: The same punishment as for the offence intended to be abetted
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence abetted is triable

Chapter_Name: – ABETMENT
Offence: Abetment of any offence, when an effect is caused by the act abetted different from that intended by the abettor
Arrest: May arrest without warrant if arrest for the offence abetted may be made without warrant but not otherwise
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence abetted
Compoundable: According as the offence abetted is compoundable or not
Punishment: The same punishment as for the offence committed
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence abetted is triable

Chapter_Name: – ABETMENT
Offence: Abetment of any offence, if abettor is present when offence is committed
Arrest: May arrest without warrant if arrest for the offence abetted may be made without warrant but not otherwise
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence abetted
Compoundable: According as the offence abetted is compoundable or not
Punishment: The same punishment as for the offence committed
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence abetted is triable

Chapter_Name: – ABETMENT
Offence: Abetment of an offence, punishable with death or transportation for life, if the offence be not committed in consequence of the abetment
Arrest: May arrest without warrant if arrest for the offence abetted may be made without warrant but not otherwise
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence abetted
Compoundable: According as the offence abetted is compoundable or not
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 7 years and fine
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence abetted is triable

Chapter_Name: – ABETMENT
Offence: If an act which causes harm be done in consequence of the abetment.
Arrest: May arrest without warrant, if arrest for the offence abetted may be made without warrant, but not otherwise.
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence abetted.
Compoundable: According as the offence abetted is compoundable or not.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 14 years and fine.
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence abetted is triable.

Chapter_Name: – ABETMENT
Offence: Abetment of an offence, punishable with imprisonment, if the offence be not committed in consequence of the abetment.
Arrest: May arrest without warrant, if arrest for the offence abetted may be made without warrant, but not otherwise.
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence abetted.
Compoundable: According as the offence abetted is compoundable or not.
Punishment: Imprisonment extending to a quarter part of the longest term, and of any description, provided for the offence, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence abetted is triable.

Chapter_Name: – ABETMENT
Offence: If the abettor or the person abetted be a public servant whose duty it is to prevent the offence.
Arrest: May arrest without warrant, if arrest for the offence abetted may be made without warrant, but not otherwise.
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence abetted.
Compoundable: According as the offence abetted is compoundable or not.
Punishment: Imprisonment extending to half of the longest term, and any description, provided for the offence, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence abetted is triable.

Chapter_Name: – ABETMENT
Offence: Abetting the commission of an offence punishable with death or by the public, or by more than ten persons.
Arrest: May arrest without warrant, if arrest for the offence abetted may be made without warrant, but not otherwise.
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence abetted.
Compoundable: According as the offence abetted is bailable or not.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 3 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence abetted is triable.

Chapter_Name: – ABETMENT
Offence: Concealing a design to commit an offence punishable with death or transportation for life, if the offence be committed.
Arrest: May arrest without warrant, if arrest for the offence abetted may be made without warrant, but not otherwise.
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence abetted.
Compoundable: According as the offence abetted is bailable or not.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 7 years, and fine.
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence abetted is triable.

Chapter_Name: – ABETMENT
Offence: If the offence be not committed.
Arrest: May arrest without warrant, if arrest for the offence abetted may be made without warrant, but not otherwise.
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence abetted.
Compoundable: According as the offence abetted is bailable or not.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 3 years and fine.
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence abetted is triable.

Chapter_Name: – ABETMENT
Offence: A public servant concealing a design to commit an offence which it is his duty to prevent, if the offence be committed.
Arrest: May arrest without warrant, if arrest for the offence abetted may be made without warrant, but not otherwise.
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence abetted.
Compoundable: According as the offence abetted is bailable or not.
Punishment: Imprisonment extending to half of the longest term, and of any description, provided for the offence, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence abetted is triable.

Chapter_Name: – ABETMENT
Offence: If the offence be punishable with death or transportation for life.
Arrest: May arrest without warrant, if arrest for the offence abetted may be made without warrant, but not otherwise.
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence abetted.
Compoundable: According as the offence abetted is compoundable or not.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 10 years.
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence abetted is triable.

Chapter_Name: – ABETMENT
Offence: If the offence be not committed
Arrest: May arrest without warrant, if arrest for the offence abetted may be made without warrant, but not otherwise.
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence abetted.
Compoundable: According as the offence abetted is compoundable or not.
Punishment: Imprisonment extending to a quarter part of the longest term, and of any description, provided for the offence, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence abetted is triable.

Chapter_Name: – ABETMENT
Offence: Concealing a design to commit an offence punishable with imprisonment if the offence be committed.
Arrest: May arrest without warrant, if arrest for the offence abetted may be made without warrant, but not otherwise.
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence abetted.
Compoundable: According as the offence abetted is compoundable or not.
Punishment: Imprisonment extending to a quarter part of the longest term, and of any description, provided for the offence, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence abetted is triable.

Chapter_Name: – ABETMENT
Offence: If the offence be not committed.
Arrest: May arrest without warrant, if arrest for the offence abetted may be made without warrant, but not otherwise.
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence abetted.
Compoundable: According as the offence abetted is compoundable or not.
Punishment: Imprisonment extending to one-eighth part of the longest term, and of the description, provided for the offence, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence abetted is triable.

Chapter_Name: CRIMINAL CONSPIRACY
Offence: Criminal conspiracy to commit an offence punishable with death, transportation or rigorous imprisonment for a term of two years or upwards.
Arrest: May arrest without warrant if arrest for the offence which is the object of the conspiracy may be made without warrant, but not otherwise.
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence which is the object of the conspiracy.
Punishment: The same punishment as provided for the abetment of the offence which is the object of the conspiracy.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Court by which abetment of the offence which is the object of conspiracy is triable.

Chapter_Name: CRIMINAL CONSPIRACY
Offence: Any other criminal conspiracy.
Arrest: Shall not arrest without a warrant.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for six months or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>2</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE STATE
Offence: Waging or attempting to wage war, or abetting the waging of war, against Bangladesh.
Punishment: Death, or transportation for life, and fine.
Court_Triable: Court of Session.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE STATE
Offence: Conspiring to commit certain offences against the State.
Punishment: Transportation for life or any shorter term, or imprisonment of either description for 10 years and fine.
Court_Triable: Court of Session.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE STATE
Offence: Collecting arms, etc., with the intention of waging war against Bangladesh.
Punishment: Transportation for life, or imprisonment of either description for 10 years and fine.
Court_Triable: Court of Session.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE STATE
Offence: Concealing with intent to facilitate a design to wage war.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 10 years, and fine.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Court of Session, Chief Metropolitan Magistrate, <sup>2</sup>Chief Judicial Magistrate, Additional Chief Judicial Magistrate or Magistrate of the first class specially empowered by the Government in that behalf.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE STATE
Offence: Condemnation of the State and advocacy of abolition of its sovereignty.
Punishment: Rigorous imprisonment for 10 years, and fine.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Court of Session, Chief Metropolitan Magistrate, <sup>2</sup>Chief Judicial Magistrate, Additional Chief Judicial Magistrate or Magistrate of the first class specially empowered by the Government in that behalf.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE STATE
Offence: Assaulting President, Government, etc., with intent to compel or restrain the exercise of any lawful power.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 7 years, and fine.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first class.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE STATE
Offence: Sedition
Punishment: Transportation for life or for any term and fine, or imprisonment of either description for 3 years and fine, or fine.
Court_Triable: Court of Session, <sup>2</sup>Chief Metropolitan Magistrate or <sup>3</sup>Chief Judicial Magistrate or Magistrate of the first class specially empowered by the Government in that behalf.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE STATE
Offence: Waging war against any Asiatic Power in alliance or at peace with Bangladesh, or abetting the waging of such war.
Punishment: Transportation for life, and fine or imprisonment of either description for 7 years and fine, or fine.
Court_Triable: Court of Session.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE STATE
Offence: Committing depredation on the territories of any power in alliance or at peace with Bangladesh.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 7 years and fine, and forfeiture of certain property.
Court_Triable: Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first class.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE STATE
Offence: Receiving property taken by war or depredation mentioned in sections 125 and 126.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 7 years and fine, and forfeiture of certain property.
Court_Triable: Shall not arrest without warrant.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE STATE
Offence: Public servant voluntarily allowing prisoner of State or war in his custody to escape.
Punishment: Transporttion for life, or imprisonment of either description for 10 years, and fine.
Court_Triable: Court of Session.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE STATE
Offence: Public servant negligently suffering prisoner of State or war in his custody to escape.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 3 years and fine.
Court_Triable: Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first class.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE STATE
Offence: Aiding escape of, rescuing or harbouring, such prisoner, or offering any resistance to the recapture of such prisoner.
Punishment: Transportation for life, or imprisonment of either description for 10 years, and fine.
Court_Triable: Court of Session.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES RELATING TO THE ARMY AND NAVY
Offence: Abetting mutiny, or attempting to seduce an officer, soldier, sailor or air man from his allegiance or duty.
Punishment: Transportation for life, or imprisonment of either description for 10 years, and fine.
Court_Triable: Court of Session.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES RELATING TO THE ARMY AND NAVY
Offence: Abetment of mutiny, if mutiny is committed in consequence thereof.
Punishment: Death, or transportation for life, or imprisonment of either description for 10 years, and fine.
Court_Triable: Court of Session.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES RELATING TO THE ARMY AND NAVY
Offence: Abetment of an assault by an officer, soldier, sailor or air man on his superior officer, when in the execution of his office.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 3 years, and fine.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first class.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES RELATING TO THE ARMY AND NAVY
Offence: Abetment of such assault, if the assault is committed.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 7 years, and fine.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first class.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES RELATING TO THE ARMY AND NAVY
Offence: Abetment of the desertion of an officer, soldier, sailor or airman.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 2 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>2</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES RELATING TO THE ARMY AND NAVY
Offence: Harbouring such an officer, soldier, sailor or airman, who has deserted.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 2 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>2</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES RELATING TO THE ARMY AND NAVY
Offence: Deserter concealed on board merchant-vessel, through negligence of master or person in charge thereof.
Punishment: Fine of 500 Taka
Court_Triable: <sup>2</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES RELATING TO THE ARMY AND NAVY
Offence: Abetment of act of insubordination by an officer, soldier, sailor or airman if the offence be committed in consequence.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 6 months, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>2</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES RELATING TO THE ARMY AND NAVY
Offence: Wearing the dress or carrying any token used by a soldier, sailor or airman with intent that it may be believed that he is such a soldier, sailor or airman.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 3 months, or fine of 500 taka, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Being member of an unlawful assembly.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 6 months or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>2</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Joining an unlawful assembly armed with any deadly weapon.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 2 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Joining or continuing in an unlawful assembly, knowing that it has been commanded to disperse.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 2 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Rioting
Compoundable: <sup>1</sup>Compoundable when permission is given by the Court before which the prosecution is pending.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 2 years, or fine or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>2</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Rioting armed with a deadly weapon.
Compoundable: <sup>1</sup>Compoundable when permission is given by the Court before which the prosecution is pending.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 3 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>3</sup>Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first or second class.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: If an offence be committed by any member of an unlawful assembly, every other member of such assembly shall be guilty of the offence.
Arrest: According as arrest may be made without warrant for the offence or not.
Warrant or Summons: According as a warrant or summons may issue for the offence.
Punishment: The same as for the offence.
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence is triable.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Hiring, engaging or employing persons to take part in an unlawful assembly.
Warrant or Summons: According to the offence committed by the person hired, engaged or employed.
Punishment: The same as for a member of such assembly, and for any offence committed by any member of such assembly.
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence is triable.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Knowingly joining or continuing in any assembly of five or more persons after it has been commanded to disperse.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 6 months, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Assaulting or obstructing public servant when suppressing riot, etc.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 3 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first or second class.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Wantonly giving provocation with intent to cause riot, if rioting be committed.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 1 year, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: If not committed.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 6 months, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Promoting enmity between classes.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 2 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Inducing students or institution interested in or connected with students to take part in any political activity.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 2 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Owner or occupier of land not giving information of riot, etc.
Punishment: Fine of Taka 1,000
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Person for whose benefit or on whose behalf a riot takes place not using all lawful means to prevent it.
Punishment: Fine
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Agent of owner or occupier for whose benefit a riot is committed not using all lawful means to prevent it.
Punishment: Fine
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Harbouring persons hired for an unlawful assembly.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 6 months, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Being hired to take part in an unlawful assembly or riot.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 6 months, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Or to go armed
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 2 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES AGAINST THE PUBLIC TRANQUILLITY
Offence: Committing affray.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for one month, or fine of 100 Taka, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES BY OR RELATING TO PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: Being or expecting to be a public servant, and taking a gratification other than legal remuneration in respect of an official Act.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 3 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first or second class.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES BY OR RELATING TO PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: Taking a gratification in order by corrupt or illegal means to influence a public servant.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 3 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first or second class.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES BY OR RELATING TO PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: Taking a gratification for the exercise of personal influence with a public servant.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 1 year, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>2</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES BY OR RELATING TO PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: Abetment by public servant of the offences defined in the last two preceding clauses with reference to himself.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 3 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first or second class.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES BY OR RELATING TO PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: Public servant obtaining any valuable thing, without consideration, from a person concerned in any proceeding or business transacted by such public servant.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 3 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first or second class.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES BY OR RELATING TO PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: Abetment of offences under sections 161 and 165.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 3 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first class.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES BY OR RELATING TO PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: Public servant disobeying a direction of the law with intent to cause injury to any person.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 1 year, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES BY OR RELATING TO PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: Public servant framing an incorrect document with intent to cause injury.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 3 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>2</sup>Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first or second class.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES BY OR RELATING TO PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: Public servant unlawfully engaging in trade.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 1 year, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES BY OR RELATING TO PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: Public servant unlawfully buying or bidding for property.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 3 years, or fine, or both and confiscation of property, if purchased.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES BY OR RELATING TO PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: Personating a public servant.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 2 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES BY OR RELATING TO PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: Wearing garb or carrying token used by public servant with fraudulent intent.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 3 months, or fine of Taka 200, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES RELATING TO ELECTIONS
Offence: Bribery
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for one year, or fine, or both or if treating only, fine only.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES RELATING TO ELECTIONS
Offence: Undue influence and personation at an election.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for one year, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES RELATING TO ELECTIONS
Offence: False statement in connection with an election.
Punishment: Fine
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES RELATING TO ELECTIONS
Offence: Illegal payments in connection with elections.
Punishment: Fine of 500 Taka
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES RELATING TO ELECTIONS
Offence: Failure to keep election accounts.
Punishment: Fine of 500 Taka
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: CONTEMPTS OF THE LAWFUL AUTHORITY OF PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: Absconding to avoid service of summons or other proceeding from a public servant.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 1 month, or fine of 500 Taka, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: CONTEMPTS OF THE LAWFUL AUTHORITY OF PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: If summons or notice require attendance in person, etc., in a Court of Justice.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 6 months, or fine of 1,000 Taka, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: CONTEMPTS OF THE LAWFUL AUTHORITY OF PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: Preventing the service, or the affixing of any summons or notice, or the removal of it when it has been affixed or preventing a proclamation.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 1 month, or fine of 500 Taka, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: CONTEMPTS OF THE LAWFUL AUTHORITY OF PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: If summons, etc., require attendance in person, etc., in a Court of Justice.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 6 months, or fine of 1,000 Taka, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: CONTEMPTS OF THE LAWFUL AUTHORITY OF PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: No obeying a legal order to attend at a certain place in person or by agent, or departing therefrom without authority.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 1 month, or fine of 500 Taka, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>1</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: CONTEMPTS OF THE LAWFUL AUTHORITY OF PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: If the order require personal attendance, etc., in a Court of Justice.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 6 months, or fine of 1,000 Taka, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: CONTEMPTS OF THE LAWFUL AUTHORITY OF PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: Intentionally omitting to produce a document to a public servant by a person legally bound to produce or deliver such document.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 1 month, or fine of 500 Taka, or both.
Court_Triable: The Court in which the offence is committed subject to the provisions of Chapter XXXV; or, if not committed in a Court, a Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first or second class.

Chapter_Name: CONTEMPTS OF THE LAWFUL AUTHORITY OF PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: If the document is required to be produced in or delivered to a Court of Justice.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 6 months, or fine of 1,000 Taka, or both.
Court_Triable: The Court in which the offence is committed subject to the provisions of Chapter XXXV; or, if not committed in a Court, a Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first or second class.

Chapter_Name: CONTEMPTS OF THE LAWFUL AUTHORITY OF PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: Intentionally omitting to give notice or information to a public servant by a person legally bound to give such notice or information.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 1 month, or fine of 500 Taka, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: CONTEMPTS OF THE LAWFUL AUTHORITY OF PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: If the notice or information required respects the commission of an offence, etc.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 6 months, or fine of 1,000 Taka, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: CONTEMPTS OF THE LAWFUL AUTHORITY OF PUBLIC SERVANTS
Offence: If the notice or information is required by an order passed under sub-section (1) of section 565 of this Code.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 6 months, or fine of 1,000 Taka or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Offence: Same offence with concealment of the former marriage from the person with whom subsequent marriage is contracted.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 10 years, and fine.
Court_Triable: Court of Sessions, Chief Metropolitan Magistrate, Chief Judicial Magistrate, Additional Chief Judicial Magistrate or Magistrate of the first class specially empowered by the Government in that behalf.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES RELATING TO MARRIAGE
Offence: A person with fraudulent intention going through the ceremony of being married, knowing that he is not thereby lawfully married.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 7 years, and fine.
Court_Triable: Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first class.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES RELATING TO MARRIAGE
Offence: Adultery
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 5 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first class.

Chapter_Name: OFFENCES RELATING TO MARRIAGE
Offence: Enticing or taking away or detaining with a criminal intent a married woman.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 2 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: DEFAMATION
Offence: Defamation
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 2 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>2</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: DEFAMATION
Offence: Printing or engraving matter knowing it to be defamatory.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 2 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>2</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: DEFAMATION
Offence: Sale of printed or engraved substance containing defamatory matter, knowing it to contain such matter.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 2 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>2</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: CRIMINAL INTIMIDATION, INSULT <sup>3</sup>PREJUDICIAL ACT AND ANNOYANCE
Offence: Insult intended to provoke a breach of the peace.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 2 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>2</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: CRIMINAL INTIMIDATION, INSULT <sup>3</sup>PREJUDICIAL ACT AND ANNOYANCE
Offence: False statement, rumour, etc., circulated with intent to cause mutiny or offence against the public peace.
Punishment: <sup>4</sup>Imprisonment for 7 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: <sup>5</sup>Court of Session.

Chapter_Name: CRIMINAL INTIMIDATION, INSULT <sup>3</sup>PREJUDICIAL ACT AND ANNOYANCE
Offence: Prejudicial Act by words, etc.
Punishment: Imprisonment for 7 years, or fine or both.
Court_Triable: Court of Sessions.

Chapter_Name: CRIMINAL INTIMIDATION, INSULT <sup>3</sup>PREJUDICIAL ACT AND ANNOYANCE
Offence: Criminal intimidation.
Punishment: Imprisonment for 7 years, or fine or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: CRIMINAL INTIMIDATION, INSULT <sup>3</sup>PREJUDICIAL ACT AND ANNOYANCE
Offence: If threat be to cause death or grievous hurt, etc.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 7 years, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first class.

Chapter_Name: CRIMINAL INTIMIDATION, INSULT <sup>3</sup>PREJUDICIAL ACT AND ANNOYANCE
Offence: Criminal intimidation by anonymous communication or having taken precaution to conceal whence the threat comes.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 2 years, in addition to the punishment under above section.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: CRIMINAL INTIMIDATION, INSULT <sup>3</sup>PREJUDICIAL ACT AND ANNOYANCE
Offence: Act caused by inducing a person to believe that he will be rendered an object of Divine displeasure.
Punishment: Imprisonment of either description for 1 year, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate.

Chapter_Name: CRIMINAL INTIMIDATION, INSULT <sup>3</sup>PREJUDICIAL ACT AND ANNOYANCE
Offence: Uttering any word or making any gesture intended to insult the modesty of a woman, etc.
Compoundable: Compoundable when permission is given by the Court before which the prosecution is pending.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 1 year, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate

Chapter_Name: CRIMINAL INTIMIDATION, INSULT <sup>3</sup>PREJUDICIAL ACT AND ANNOYANCE
Offence: Appearing in a public place, etc., in a state of intoxication, and causing annoyance to any person.
Punishment: Simple imprisonment for 24 hours, or fine of 10 Taka, or both.
Court_Triable: Any Judicial Magistrate

Chapter_Name: ATTEMPTS TO COMMIT OFFENCES
Offence: Attempting to commit offences punishable with transportation or imprisonment, and in such attempt doing any act towards the commission of the offence.
Arrest: According as the offence is one in respect of which the police may arrest without warrant or not.
Warrant or Summons: According as the offence is one in respect of which a summons or warrant shall ordinarily issue.
Compoundable: Compoundable when permission is given by the Court before which the prosecution is pending.
Punishment: Transportation or imprisonment not exceeding half of the longest term, and of any description, provided for the offence, or fine, or both.
Court_Triable: The Court by which the offence attempted is triable.

Chapter_Name: ATTEMPTS TO COMMIT OFFENCES
Offence: If punishable with death, transportation or imprisonment for <sup>2</sup>more than <sup>3</sup>five years.
Court_Triable: Court of Session.

Chapter_Name: ATTEMPTS TO COMMIT OFFENCES
Offence: If punishable with imprisonment for not less than two years and not more than <sup>3</sup>five years.
Court_Triable: <sup>4</sup>Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first class or second class.

Chapter_Name: ATTEMPTS TO COMMIT OFFENCES
Offence: If punishable with imprisonment for <sup>5</sup>less than two years or with fine only.
Court_Triable: <sup>6</sup>Any Judicial Magistrate.
